resources.string: Control and monitor your server room from anywhere, anytime
Enter your email address and we\'ll send you a one-time password to reset your password.
Monitor and control your room server
Welcome to the Room Server Monitor application. This guide will help you understand how to use all the features of your server room monitoring system.
The Room Server Monitor app allows you to monitor and control critical environmental conditions in your server room from anywhere, ensuring the safety and optimal performance of your equipment.

• Monitor real-time data from all installed sensors:
 - Temperature: Current temperature in °C
 - Humidity: Current humidity percentage
 - Water: Detects water leaks that could damage equipment
 - Fire: Monitors for fire detection
 - Gas: Detects harmful gas levels
 - Motion: Alerts you to unexpected movement

• Control devices remotely:
 - Light: Toggle server room lights on/off
 - Fan: Control cooling fans
 - Door: Secure access by locking/unlocking doors
 - Camera: Enable/disable surveillance camera

• Access historical sensor data to identify patterns
• View time-stamped logs of all sensor readings
• Pull-to-refresh for the latest data
• Color-coded indicators highlight critical values

• Receive real-time alerts when sensor values exceed safe thresholds
• View all past notifications in chronological order
• Mark notifications as read individually or all at once
• Configure notification preferences in Settings

• Language: Switch between English and Arabic
• Theme: Choose between Light and Dark mode
• Notification Style: Select from sound, vibration, or silent notifications
• Mute Notifications: Temporarily silence alerts (15 min to 24 hours)

• No Sensor Data:
 - Check WiFi connection on both device and server
 - Verify the ESP32 controller is powered on
 - Restart the app and server if connection issues persist
• Device Control Issues:\n - Ensure all devices are properly connected to the control system\n - Check for firmware updates on your ESP32 controller
• Alert System:\n - Test the system monthly to ensure all alerts function correctly\n - Verify notification settings if alerts aren\'t being received
For more detailed technical information or assistance, please use the Contact Support button below.
If you need additional help or have specific questions about your server room monitoring system, our technical support team is ready to assist you.

Please describe your issue here.

Device Information:
- App Version: 1.0
- Device Model: %1$s
- Android Version: %2$s
